config.music_gen.disabled_notice: Music generation is disabled. Enable the toggle above to let the agent generate music.
config.music_gen.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle above to let the agent generate music using AI models.
config.music_gen.provider_desc: Select a provider configured in Provider Management. Supported types: MiniMax (music), Google (google_lyria).
config.music_gen.limits_desc: Configure daily limits for music generation.
